name: Freedom Drive
short_description: Fast paced Action Bullet hell. Defeat enemies and collect xp to level up. Every level gets you a new weapon or upgrade! Use weapons like Giant Spinning Saw Blades or swarms of Micro Rockets to defeat the boss at the end of each level!
detailed_description:
EARLY ACCESS DISCLAIMER


- There is Currently 1 to 2 hours worth of content if you unlock everything.
- There will be bugs, i'm a solo Developer and i'm releasing content rapidly. So i don't get a chance to play the game every time i update it.
- If you join the Early Access be ready to report bugs, i am full time, so if you report it to my discord and get my attention i can fix it the same day.

- You guys are super important to the future of Freedom Drive. Leave suggestions, i am more then willing to listen.



Defeat the Boss of each location. Survive the Onslaught of deadly vehicles, environments.
Unlock new, faster, stronger or stranger vehicles to aid you in your mission for Freedom. Build your strength to take on stronger challengers!

Upgrades

Mountains of weapons to customize your play style. You can use Heavy Flamers to melt away problems, or Flying Saw Blades that travel a great distance and hit multiple enemies at once!

Vehicles

There is a vehicle for every play style. From speed Demons, to slow lumbering impenetrable goliaths. Each vehicle comes with its own main weapon and upgrades to diversify the playing field.

Maps

Three biomes with three maps each full of new enemies to challenge your freedom. Each map is home to a unique boss and environmental hazards for you to learn and take advantage of - or die trying.




-Early Access-
Find out everything you need to know on the discord

More information about the early access will become available closer to Early Access Release
